title: Monkers Tools
description: Makes the tools look cleaner and more realistic.
body:
I made this resource pack because I thought the default tool textures were too bland, so I decided to make them look more like real-life tools and Actions & Stuff! I’ll be making a resource pack for armor soon as well. This was made over the course of two days, so don’t expect too much. I will also add other tools soon!

You need Optifine or Emf+Etf for the 3d fish hook bobber to work

https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features

https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures

https://optifine.net/downloads
